'''Brett Goldspink''' is an Australian [[rugby league]] player who played professionally in England and Australia.

==Playing career==
Goldspink played for [[Illawarra Steelers|Illawarra]], [[South Sydney Rabbitohs|South Sydney]] and [[Western Reds]] in Australia between 1992 and 1996.<ref>Alan Whiticker/Glen Hudson: The Encyclopedia of Rugby League Players. (1995 edition) {{ISBN|1875169571}}</ref>

Goldspink played for Souths in their upset 1994 [[Tooheys Challenge Cup]] final victory over [[Brisbane Broncos|Brisbane]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.rabbitohs.com.au/news/2018/04/24/the-giant-killers/|title=The Giant Killers|website=rabbitohs.com.au|date=21 January 2024 }}</ref> He was part of the Reds inaugural side on 12 March 1995.<ref name=rlp/>

He then moved to England and played for the [[Oldham R.L.F.C.|Oldham Bears]], [[St Helens R.F.C.|St. Helens]], [[Wigan Warriors]] and [[Halifax R.L.F.C.|Halifax]] between 1997 and 2002.<ref name=rlp/><ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.ssralmanac.com/mobile/players_g/player_goldspink_brett.htm|title=South Sydney Rabbitohs Rugby League Player Report – Brett Goldspink|website=ssralmanac.com}}</ref>
